character-description-paragraphs.structure: Opens with aphoristic statement, then develops through direct address and extended climbing metaphor. Builds through hypotheticals to grim conclusion.
rhetorical-dna: Direct address creating intimate tutorial tone
Life-as-X metaphor sustained through multiple scenarios
Dark humor in final image (Example: corpse vs. successful climber)
character-description-paragraphs.respecification-seed: A character proposes that indirect paths succeed where direct ones lead to ruin or death.

character-description-paragraphs.structure: Formal address establishing debt, pivoting to offer of counsel. Single building sentence leading to promise of singular solution.
rhetorical-dna: Tease structure: many options considered, one chosen
Formal register throughout, deferential but confident
character-description-paragraphs.respecification-seed: An character makes a pledge and promises a single best choice after much deliberation.

character-description-paragraphs.structure: Opens with chiding observation, proceeds through dismissal of obvious strengths, builds to revelation of hidden greater power. Three beats: critique, enumeration, climactic mystery.
rhetorical-dna: Deliberate undercutting of military assets to elevate something intangible
Suspense through withholding: the greater thing unnamed
Direct address maintaining intimate advisory tone
character-description-paragraphs.respecification-seed: A character warns against relying on obvious strength, hinting at a hidden greater asset.
